# Project Guidance

See [`CLAUDE.md`](CLAUDE.md) for complete documentation about this codebase and working with it.

## Agent Roles

See [`.agents/`](.agents/) for agent role definitions (Architect, Developer, Reviewer). 

**Do not edit this file to change agent behavior.** Agent instructions live in the `.agents/` directory. To modify an agent, edit the corresponding file in `.agents/` instead.
